title: The Iron Flail
content:
Time beats out all things with his iron flail,
    Things great, things small.
    With steady strokes that never fail,
    With slow, sure strokes of his iron flail,
    Time beats out all.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, William Arthur Dunkerley (John Oxenham) delivers a powerful performance in "The Iron Flail"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
